title: Reading, Vocabulary & Topic Expansion — Guessing Words from Context
objectives: Hiểu và áp dụng: guessing words from context
Học 24 từ vựng theo chủ đề tuần 12
Hoàn thành 40 câu hỏi trắc nghiệm tăng dần độ khó
Bám sát mục tiêu tuần: Reading, Vocabulary & Topic Expansion
lesson: **Reading, Vocabulary & Topic Expansion.** Good reading **comprehension** means finding the **main idea** and important **details** in a **passage**. **Skim** a text quickly to get the general meaning, then **scan** to find specific information such as names or numbers. Use the **context** to guess the meaning of new **vocabulary**, and look for **synonyms** and **antonyms**. Separate **facts** from **opinions**, and notice the **author's** **purpose** and **attitude**. Common B1 topics include **travel**, **health**, **society**, **culture** and the **environment**. After reading, write a short **summary** in your own words. Practise reading a 150–200 word **article** every day and answering questions about the main idea, details and new words.
